sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74119" key="o)noke/falos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀνο-κέφᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74119.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with the head of an ass,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">70</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2052.tlg001:1:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Horap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
